title: What is RAG
content: Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines retrieval with generation to improve LLM accuracy.

title: Why use Transformers
content: Transformers allow parallel processing and handle long-range dependencies effectively.

title: Vector Databases
content: Vector databases store embeddings and enable fast similarity search.

title: LangChain Basics
content: LangChain helps build LLM-powered applications with modular components.

title: Chunking Strategy
content: Splitting documents into chunks improves retrieval performance in RAG systems.
